title: How To: Awning
excerpt: Extend and retract the Carefree Eclipse automated awning.

items.label: Location of awning control panel, next to the Garmin unit

list.name: Product page
description: The Eclipse 12V scissor-arm (armless) awning installed on this van.

list.name: Owner's manual
description: Operating instructions matching the simple ON/RETRACT, OFF/EXTEND switch installed — no auto-retract.

list.name: Installation manual
description: Wiring and mounting reference for the awning as originally installed by the manufacturer.

list.name: Product page
description: Bluetooth motion-sensor auto-retract and app-control upgrade. NOT installed on this van — listed for reference only.

list.name: Owner's manual (with BT12 / Connects motion sensor)
description: Describes the Bluetooth motion-sensor auto-retract system. NOT installed on this van — listed for reference only.

list.name: Mobile app manual
description: Covers the Carefree Mobile app used to control the BT12 system from a phone. NOT installed on this van — listed for reference only.
